# Peptide Nerds
> Research-backed peptide education for weight loss, healing, and optimization. 44 compound profiles, side-by-side comparisons, dosage calculators, and weekly research updates.

Last updated: 2026-03-04
Contact: https://peptidenerds.com/contact

## Compound Database — GLP-1 / Weight Loss
- [Semaglutide](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/semaglutide): GLP-1 receptor agonist FDA-approved for weight loss (Ozempic/Wegovy)
- [Tirzepatide](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/tirzepatide): Dual GIP/GLP-1 agonist FDA-approved for weight loss (Mounjaro/Zepbound)
- [Retatrutide](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/retatrutide): Triple agonist (GLP-1/GIP/glucagon) in Phase 3 clinical trials
- [Liraglutide](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/liraglutide): GLP-1 agonist FDA-approved for weight management (Saxenda)
- [Survodutide](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/survodutide): Dual GLP-1/glucagon agonist in clinical trials
- [Cagrilintide](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/cagrilintide): Amylin analog for weight management (CagriSema combination)
- [Mazdutide](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/mazdutide): GLP-1/glucagon dual agonist in clinical development
- [Tesofensine](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/tesofensine): Triple monoamine reuptake inhibitor for weight loss

## Compound Database — Healing & Recovery
- [BPC-157](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/bpc-157): Body Protection Compound derived from gastric juice
- [TB-500](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/tb-500): Thymosin Beta-4 fragment for tissue repair
- [Thymosin Beta-4](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/thymosin-beta-4): Full-length thymosin protein for healing
- [KPV](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/kpv): Anti-inflammatory tripeptide from alpha-MSH
- [LL-37](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/ll-37): Antimicrobial peptide from cathelicidin
- [ARA-290](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/ara-290): Erythropoietin-derived tissue-protective peptide

## Compound Database — Growth Hormone Secretagogues
- [Ipamorelin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/ipamorelin): Selective GH secretagogue
- [CJC-1295](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/cjc-1295): GHRH analog for sustained GH release
- [Sermorelin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/sermorelin): GHRH analog for GH stimulation
- [Tesamorelin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/tesamorelin): FDA-approved GHRH analog for lipodystrophy
- [GHRP-2](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/ghrp-2): Growth hormone releasing peptide-2
- [GHRP-6](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/ghrp-6): Growth hormone releasing peptide-6
- [Hexarelin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/hexarelin): Potent GH secretagogue hexapeptide
- [IGF-1 LR3](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/igf-1-lr3): Long-acting insulin-like growth factor
- [MGF](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/mgf): Mechano growth factor splice variant of IGF-1

## Compound Database — Anti-Aging
- [GHK-Cu](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/ghk-cu): Copper peptide for skin regeneration and wound healing
- [Epitalon](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/epitalon): Telomerase-activating tetrapeptide
- [FOXO4-DRI](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/foxo4-dri): Senolytic peptide targeting aged cells
- [SS-31](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/ss-31): Mitochondria-targeted antioxidant peptide
- [NAD+](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/nad-plus): Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide for cellular energy

## Compound Database — Nootropics & Cognitive
- [Semax](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/semax): Nootropic peptide for cognitive enhancement
- [Selank](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/selank): Anxiolytic nootropic peptide
- [Cerebrolysin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/cerebrolysin): Neuropeptide preparation for neurological conditions
- [Dihexa](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/dihexa): Angiotensin IV analog for cognitive function
- [Pinealon](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/pinealon): Short peptide bioregulator for brain function

## Compound Database — Metabolic & Body Composition
- [AOD-9604](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/aod-9604): Growth hormone fragment for fat metabolism
- [MOTS-c](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/mots-c): Mitochondrial-derived exercise mimetic peptide
- [SLU-PP-332](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/slu-pp-332): Exercise mimetic compound
- [Follistatin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/follistatin): Myostatin inhibitor for muscle growth

## Compound Database — Other
- [PT-141](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/pt-141): FDA-approved melanocortin agonist for sexual dysfunction
- [Melanotan II](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/melanotan-ii): Melanocortin peptide for tanning and libido
- [Gonadorelin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/gonadorelin): GnRH analog for hormone regulation
- [Kisspeptin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/kisspeptin): Neuropeptide regulating reproductive hormones
- [DSIP](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/dsip): Delta sleep-inducing peptide for sleep regulation
- [Oxytocin](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/oxytocin): Social bonding and mood regulation peptide
- [VIP](https://peptidenerds.com/peptides/vip): Vasoactive intestinal peptide
